analysis.referral_fee_resolver_health_note: High counts of default/csv-only sources indicate weak category resolution; ensure AMAZON_LWA_*, AMAZON_SPAPI_*, and KEEPA_API_KEY are set for production ASIN lists.

order_demand_rollup_quantity.notes: Tiers by quantity_weight or revenue_usd_weight per dest ZIP3. Missing postal: state hub ZIP3 fallback from mock 48-state grid.

order_demand_rollup_revenue.notes: Tiers by quantity_weight or revenue_usd_weight per dest ZIP3. Missing postal: state hub ZIP3 fallback from mock 48-state grid.

narrative_hints: other_expenses_usd captures unmapped spend columns — compare to Cortex inbound/outbound defaults (not Amazon fees).
Sum other_expenses_usd=0.00 vs rough modeled 3PL handling (defaults) ~908.04 on 1589 rows.
referral_fee_source_counts: default/unknown spikes mean missing ASIN or SP-API/Keepa resolution failure — use real ASINs in production (avoid demo ASIN randomization scripts).

summary.headline: Modeled 1932 units across 8 destination bucket(s); direct multi-origin total $15643.32 vs best linehaul+parcel path $16127.64 (delta $-484.32).

options.title: Direct parcel from best origin per destination
options.tradeoffs: No inbound consolidation linehaul; fastest to reason about operationally. Often higher total $ on long or fragmented lanes in mocks.

options.title: Linehaul + parcel via receive node 60607 (RCV-reg_mw)
options.tradeoffs: Pools into one DC then parcels out — can reduce total $ when linehaul efficiency beats multi-origin parcel. Uses capacity at chosen receive node.

options.title: Linehaul + parcel via receive node 07102 (RCV-reg_ne)
options.tradeoffs: Pools into one DC then parcels out — can reduce total $ when linehaul efficiency beats multi-origin parcel. Uses capacity at chosen receive node.

methodology.strategy_a_direct: Parcel from each **origin** to each destination bucket; cheapest origin wins per bucket.
methodology.strategy_b_consolidated: Mock linehaul to receive DC, then parcel from **receive node ZIP** to customers — final mile is not priced from the original origin.
methodology.shippo_mock_note: When parcel legs use integrated pricing, SHIPPO_MOCK_MODE shapes RateShoppingService quotes; linehaul is still mock.
methodology.parcel_model: integrated RateShoppingService when SHIPPO_API_KEY is set, else carriers_fallback mock zones

us_state_demand_forecast.refresh_policy: Annual or on deploy; replace table in us_state_demand_share.py or future config-driven loader.
us_state_demand_forecast.seasonality_note: Static shares — no within-year seasonal adjustment in-model.
us_state_demand_forecast.note: Planning prior; override with label-derived state mix when available.

trace: Candidate ordering uses demand-weighted mock parcel to 48 state hubs (2026 prior) + label hot-ZIP3 proxy.
Volume tier allows up to 2 node(s); enforcing ≥100 units/mo per active node; with 3+ nodes each must clear ≥500.
k=1: accepted — shares from inverse mean mock; min flow ≈ 587.0 units/mo.
k=2: accepted — shares from inverse mean mock; min flow ≈ 286.5 units/mo.

deltas.non_goals: CSV marketplace fees are not outbound shipping invoices; scenario is mock/LTL+parcel sample. Do not treat deltas as cash savings guarantees.
